audit.reason: The markdown is well-structured, clear, and provides comprehensive information about the Zama Creator Program Season 3 completion and Season 4 launch. It includes all the necessary details and is easy to read.
audit.improvements: The markdown could be slightly improved by adding a bit more context about the programs and how they benefit the community. Additionally, some minor formatting adjustments could enhance readability.

work:
```markdown
# Zama Creator Program Season 3 is Completed and Season 4 is Now Live!

Zama, an open-source cryptography company building state-of-the-art Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) solutions for blockchain, has concluded Season 3 of its Creator Program.

### Funding and Genesis Operators

- **Funding Secured:** $130M from top-tier investors including Pantera Capital, Multicoin Capital, Protocol Labs, and others.
- **Genesis Operators Announced:** Stake Capital, ETHERScan, Dfns, Kudasai JP, P2P Validator, Orion Finance, and more.

### Season 3 Results

The Leaderboard rankings will be revealed soon.

#### Total Monthly Prize Pool Breakdown

- **$56K:** Total Monthly Prize Pool
  - **$50K:** Distributed to top 100 creators
  - **$3K:** For 6 handpicked content creators
  - **$3K:** For 6 handpicked video creators

#### Recognition Tiers System

- **Top 100:** Monthly cash prizes in USDC or $ZAMA tokens
- **Top 1000:** Zama OG NFT 003 NFT with alpha access and exclusive benefits
- **Top 2:** Additional monthly cash prizes in USDC or $ZAMA tokens

### Season Progression

- **Season 1:** Top 250 received Zama OG 001 NFTs
- **Season 2:** Top 500 received Zama OG 002 NFTs
- **Season 3:** Top 1000 will receive Zama OG 003 NFTs

### Explore Other Programs

- **Zama Developer Program:** [https://www.zama.org/programs/developer-program](https://www.zama.org/programs/developer-program)
- **Zama Bounty Program:** [https://github.com/zama-ai/bounty-program](https://github.com/zama-ai/bounty-program)

### OG NFT Domain

- **Claims Coming Soon:** [https://www.zama.org/nft/og](https://www.zama.org/nft/og)

### New Creators Can Join the Zama Creator Guild

- **Join Now:** [https://guild.xyz/zama/creator-program](https://guild.xyz/zama/creator-program)

#ZamaCreatorProgram
```
